title: humboltia prolifera
intro: Humboltia prolifera, also known as the Indian or Ayurvedic spurge, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Humboltia prolifera include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reducing inflammation and pain, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make ointments, creams, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to the affected areas.
